name: blotterbook
description: DEV-ONLY tooling for Blotterbook (tests + lint + format). The SHIPPED app has ZERO runtime dependencies — everything here is devDependencies that run locally/CI and never alter the deployed static files. See docs/build-step-decision.md (R19).

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: node scripts/test-adapters.mjs && node scripts/test-auth.mjs && node scripts/test-version.mjs && node scripts/test-flags.mjs && node scripts/test-tax.mjs
